rows.reference: AFTER EARLY NIGHTFALL THE YELLOW LAMPS WOULD LIGHT UP HERE AND THERE THE SQUALID QUARTER OF THE BROTHELS
rows.fp32_text: After early nightfall, the yellow lamps would light up here and there the squalid quarter of the brothels.
rows.quant_text: After early nightfall the yellow lamps would light up here and there the squalid quarter of the brothels.

rows.reference: GOD AS A DIRECT CONSEQUENCE OF THE SIN WHICH MAN THUS PUNISHED HAD GIVEN HER A LOVELY CHILD WHOSE PLACE WAS ON THAT SAME DISHONOURED BOSOM TO CONNECT HER PARENT FOR EVER WITH THE RACE AND DESCENT OF MORTALS AND TO BE FINALLY A BLESSED SOUL IN HEAVEN
rows.fp32_text: God, as a direct consequence of the sin which man thus punished, had given her a lovely child whose place was on that same dishonored bosom to connect her parrot forever with the race and descent of mortals, and to be finally a blessed soul in heaven."
rows.quant_text: God, as a direct consequence of the sin which man thus punished, had given her a lovely child whose place was on that same dishonored bosom to connect her parent forever with the race and descent of mortals, and to be finally a blessed soul in heaven."

rows.reference: YET THESE THOUGHTS AFFECTED HESTER PRYNNE LESS WITH HOPE THAN APPREHENSION
rows.fp32_text: Yet these thoughts affected Hester-Prin less with hope than apprehension.
rows.quant_text: Yet these thoughts affected Hester-Prin less with hope than apprehension.
